primary_diagnosis:
Acute lymphoblastic leukemia, BCR::ABL1-positive (common-B-ALL), ID 07/2022
At initial diagnosis:
PB: Hb 9,8 g/dl, Plt 95/nl, WBC 42,5/nl, 40% blasts
Cytology (BM): blast percentage 65%
Histology (BM): Blast infiltration of approx. 80%, marrow fibrosis WHO-Grade 1
Cytogenetics (BM): 46,XY,t(9;22)(q34;q11.2)[5]/46,idem,-7[12]/46,XY[3], Detection the
Philadelphia-translocation, subclone with monosomy 7
Flow cytometry (BM): 72% blasts; LAIP with ED: CD45 low, SSC low, CD34+, CD19+, CD20-,
CD22+, TdT+, CD10+, CD38+, CD33-/+
Molecular genetics (BM): BCR::ABL1 positive (p190, e1a2); FLT3, NPM1, IDH1/2 WT
MRD Marker (PB): Molecular MRD markers established: IGH VH-JH clonal V4-34 J4, IGK
Vk-Kde clonal
Cytology (CSF): Cell count 2/nl, no detection of atypical cells
question: Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
tumor_board_decision:
Pathogenic variant. Study option with KRAS-G12D- / MEK-Inhibitor (Trametinib)
recommended.
raw_vignette:
Age: 59
ECOG: 1
Primary diagnosis:
Acute lymphoblastic leukemia, BCR::ABL1-positive (common-B-ALL), ID 07/2022
At initial diagnosis:
PB: Hb 9,8 g/dl, Plt 95/nl, WBC 42,5/nl, 40% blasts
Cytology (BM): blast percentage 65%
Histology (BM): Blast infiltration of approx. 80%, marrow fibrosis WHO-Grade 1
Cytogenetics (BM): 46,XY,t(9;22)(q34;q11.2)[5]/46,idem,-7[12]/46,XY[3], Detection the
Philadelphia-translocation, subclone with monosomy 7
Flow cytometry (BM): 72% blasts; LAIP with ED: CD45 low, SSC low, CD34+, CD19+, CD20-,
CD22+, TdT+, CD10+, CD38+, CD33-/+
Molecular genetics (BM): BCR::ABL1 positive (p190, e1a2); FLT3, NPM1, IDH1/2 WT
MRD Marker (PB): Molecular MRD markers established: IGH VH-JH clonal V4-34 J4, IGK
Vk-Kde clonal
Cytology (CSF): Cell count 2/nl, no detection of atypical cells
Secondary diagnoses:
COPD
Arterial hypertension
Type 2 diabetes mellitus
Treatment and course:
Molecular genetic findings
Question for the tumor board:
Pathogenic variant? Targeted Therapy?
Tumor board decision:
Pathogenic variant. Study option with KRAS-G12D- / MEK-Inhibitor (Trametinib)
recommended.
================================================================================
TREATMENT TIMELINE
================================================================================
02/2021 Initial diagnosis: common-B-ALL (BCR::ABL-positive).
11.03.2021 D1 Pre-phase (GMALL): Dexamethason + Cyclophosphamid + intrathecal MTX.
16.03.2021 Induction I (GMALL) + Dasatinib
02.04.2021 Intrathecal MTX; CSF-FACS: no blasts.
03.04.2021 D20 (readmission 02.04): Continuation Induction I + Dasatinib; D20
Pegasparaginase, D21 Vincristin.
05.04.2021 D22 Remission assessment: BM 2% blasts; FACS 0,4% (MRD+); Kiel MRD+;
BCR::ABL approx. 9%.
11.04.2021 D28 Vincristin; Dasatinib paused with acute pancreatitis.
19.04.2021 D34 intrathecal MTX 15 mg.
20.04.2021 D35 Vincristin 1 mg absolute.
22.04.2021 Treatment continuation with Imatinib 600 mg/d.
14.05.2021 Remission assessment: complete remission; BCR::ABL MRD ~2,0%.
18.05.-22.05.2021 D61-65 Consolidation I: Vindesin d61, HD-MTX d61, Etoposid d64-65,
Cytarabin 2x2 g/m2 d65.
04.06.2021 D76 intrathecal Triple (AraC/MTX/Dexa).
10.06.2021 BMA: cytol. CR, FACS MRD-; BCR::ABL ~0,07% (MVZ); Kiel: 1 Marker pos.
(2E-05), BCR::ABL ~0,1%.
18.06.2021 Blinatumomab Cycle 1 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.
24.06.2021 Intrathecal Triple (fluoroscopy-guided).
16.07.2021 BMA: cyCR (1% blasts), FACS MRD-, FISH no evidence t(9;22); Kiel MRD-
(<1E-05).
29.07.2021 Blinatumomab Cycle 2 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.

31.08.2021 BMA: cytol. CR, FACS MRD-; BCR::ABL ~0,009%.
09.09.2021 Intrathecal Triple (fluoroscopy-guided): no blasts.
10.09.2021 Blinatumomab Cycle 3 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.
12.10.2021 BMA: cytol. CR, FISH neg.; BCR::ABL ~0,0025%.
20.10.2021 Intrathecal Triple (fluoroscopy-guided): no blasts.
22.10.2021 Blinatumomab Cycle 4 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.
24.11.2021 BMA: cytol. CR, FISH neg.; BCR::ABL ~0,013%; Kiel MRD-.
03.12.2021 Blinatumomab Cycle 5 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.
27.12.2021 BMA: cytol. CR (3% blasts); BCR::ABL ~0,030%; FACS MRD-, Kiel MRD-.
21.01.2022 Blinatumomab Cycle 6 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.
22.02.2022 BMA: cytol. CR (4% blasts); BCR::ABL ~0,010%; FACS MRD-, Kiel MRD-.
02.03.2022 Tumorboard: Blinatumomab maintenance every 12 weeks (to 1 year); Imatinib
600 mg/d long-term to Relapse/Tox.
14.04.2022 Intrathecal Triple CT-guided.
18.04.2022 Blinatumomab Cycle 7 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.
27.05.2022 Remission assessment (BMA): Punctio sicca; BCR::ABL ~0,041%; FACS MRD-,
Kiel MRD-.
08.07.2022 Blinatumomab Cycle 8 + Imatinib 600 mg/d.
12.08.2022 Remission assessment (BMA): CR; BCR::ABL ~0,090%; FACS MRD-, Kiel MRD-.
04.09.2022 Switch to Dasatinib 100 mg 1-0-0 with peripheral edema.
29.09.2022 Remission assessment (PB): BCR::ABL ~0,03%; Kiel MRD-.
18.10.2022 Switch to Bosutinib 200 mg 1-0-0 with rash/pruritus.
20.11.2022 Remission assessment (BMA): CR; BCR::ABL ~0,011%; FACS MRD-, Kiel MRD-.
11.03.2023 Remission assessment (BMA): CR; BCR::ABL ~0,145%; FACS MRD-, Kiel MRD-.
25.03.2023 Currently: Suspected progression.
